# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  servicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The Object ID of the existing Service Principal (not the App ID)
    minLength: 36
    maxLength: 36

  roleName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Contributor
    allowedValues:
      - Contributor
      - Reader
      - Website Contributor
      - SQL DB Contributor
      - Storage Account Contributor
      - Network Contributor
      - Key Vault Secrets User
    metadata:
      description: Select the minimum role required for your pipeline

  roleAssignmentGuid:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[newGuid()]"
    metadata:
      description: Unique GUID for the role assignment

variables:
  # Built-in role definition IDs
  roleDefinitionIds:
    Contributor: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]"
    Reader: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7')]"
    Website Contributor: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'de139f84-1756-47ae-9be6-808fbbe84772')]"
    SQL DB Contributor: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '9b7fa17d-e63e-47b0-bb0a-15c516ac86ec')]"
    Storage Account Contributor: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '17d1049b-9a84-46fb-8f53-869881c3d3ab')]"
    Network Contributor: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '4d97b98b-1d4f-4787-a291-c67834d212e7')]"
    Key Vault Secrets User: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6')]"

resources:
  # Role assignment scoped to THIS resource group only (not subscription-wide)
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('roleAssignmentGuid')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      roleDefinitionId: "[variables('roleDefinitionIds')[parameters('roleName')]]"
      description: "[concat('CI/CD pipeline role assignment - ', parameters('roleName'), ' - scoped to resource group')]"

outputs:
  roleAssignmentId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', parameters('roleAssignmentGuid'))]"
  roleAssignmentScope:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceGroup().id]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "This role is scoped to the resource group level. If you need multiple resource groups, deploy this template to each one separately. Do NOT grant subscription-wide Contributor access."
